Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits, indicating good glycemic and renal function. However, lipid profile shows elevated total cholesterol and LDL, and low HDL, which increases cardiovascular risk. Recommend clinical correlation and consideration of lipid-lowering therapy and lifestyle modification. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Regular monitoring advised.
